sentences.translationEn: Tawhid is the foundation of the Islamic religion.

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي التَّوْحِيدُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ وَاحِدٌ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَهُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ.
sentences.translation: Tevhid znači da je Allah jedan i da nema sudruga, i da je On Stvoritelj svega.
sentences.translationEn: Tawhid means that Allah is One with no partner, and He is the Creator of all things.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَنْ مَاتَ وَهُوَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Ko umre znajući da nema boga osim Allaha, ući će u Džennet.'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Whoever dies knowing that there is no god but Allah will enter Paradise.'

sentences.arabic: وَهَذَا يُبَيِّنُ أَنَّ التَّوْحِيدَ هُوَ أَعْظَمُ مَا يُقَرِّبُ الْعَبْدَ إِلَى رَبِّهِ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Muslim u Kitabu-l-imanu] Ovo pokazuje da je tevhid najveće što roba približava njegovom Gospodaru.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Faith] This shows that tawhid is the greatest thing that draws a servant close to his Lord.

sentences.arabic: فَعَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُحَقِّقَ التَّوْحِيدَ فِي قَلْبِهِ وَلِسَانِهِ وَعَمَلِهِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Stoga je dužnost muslimana da tevhid ostvari u svom srcu, jeziku i djelima svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, a Muslim must realise tawhid in his heart, tongue and deeds every day.
